Your loan application has been reviewed and unfortunately cannot be approved at this time. The decision is based on the following factors: Your credit score of 500 is significantly below our lending threshold of 620. Your existing debt obligations relative to your monthly income (1,776.88% debt-to-income ratio) exceed acceptable lending standards. Your credit report shows default accounts and late payment history, indicating past difficulty in meeting financial obligations. The proposed loan amount is not supportable by your current income and existing financial commitments. We recommend working on rebuilding your credit profile, reducing existing debt, and reapplying once your credit score improves above 620 and your debt-to-income ratio falls below 43%. If you have questions about this decision, please contact our customer service team.
